rulings.Case Title: MEDICAL STAFFING NETWORK INC A DELAWARE VS. SALESFORCE.COM INC DBA DELAWARE SALESFORCE COM A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of First And Eighth Causes To Action Fand Prayer For Punitive Damages In First Amended Complaint Filed By Pltf And Cross-Deft Medical Staffing Network,Inc.
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 18, 2007, LINE 8. CROSS COMPLAINANT SALESFORCE.COM INC.'S (D.B.A. DELAWARE SALESFORCE.COM) Motion To Strike Portions Of First And Eighth Causes To Action and Prayer For Punitive Damages In First Amended Complaint Filed By PLAINTIFF And Cross-DEFENDANT Medical Staffing Network, Inc. MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS DENIED IN PART BASED ON THE RULINGS ON THE DEMURRER TO THE FOURTH AND EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED IN PART WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO USE COMMERCIALLY REASONABLE EFFORTS. MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS DENIED IN PART FOR REASONS STATED IN CONNECTION WITH THE DEMURRER AND SUSTAINED IN PART WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO USE COMMERCIALLY REASONABLE EFFORTS. PUNITIVE DAMAGES GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING THAT AN OFFICER, DIRECTOR OR MANAGING AGENT COMMITTED OR RATIFIED THE ACTS. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: MEDICAL STAFFING NETWORK INC A DELAWARE VS. SALESFORCE.COM INC DBA DELAWARE SALESFORCE COM A et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 18, 2007, Line 8. Cross-complainant Salesforce.Com Inc.'s (d.b.a. Delaware Salesforce.Com) Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer as to the 4th Cause of Action is overruled. Paragraphs 30 through 32 allege a subsequent oral and written contract that amends and/or supersedes exhibit and its integration clause. The terms of Exhibit D may be explained by parol evidence under P.G.& E. vs. G. W. Thomas Drayage & Rigging Co.(1968) 69c.2d 33. Demurrer as to the 5th Cause of Action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff pleads facts to meet the elements of negligent misrepresentation but fails to allege that the fraud consists of anything more than a future promise. Under Tarman v State Farm Mutual Auto Insurance (1991) 2CalApp4th 153, 158, there is no tort for a negligent false promise. Demurrer as to the 6th and 7th Causes of Action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has not alleged restoration of the property. Civil Code Section 1691(b). Demurrer as to the 2nd Cause of Action is overruled based on plaintiff's allegations of fraud under Civic Center Drive Apartments v Southwestern Bell (2003) 295 f. Supp. 2d 1091, 1106. Demurrer as to the 3rd Cause of Action is sustained with leave to amend to allege defendant's breach was as a consequence of circumstances within its control. Demurrer as to the 8th Cause of Action is overruled; the underlying causes of action have not be shown to fail. Demurrer as to the 9th Cause of Action is overruled, Tarman does not require where the allegations were made. Demurrer as to the 10th Cause of Action is sustained with leave to amend to describe in greater detail the scheme to mislead & details related to the deceptive nature of advertising and promotional material. Demurrer as to the 11th Cause of Action is overruled. California allows extrinsic evidence to establish a different meaning to unambiguous language. P. G. & E.
